scripts.dev: bash scripts/with-node.sh npm run dev --workspace apps/backend & bash scripts/with-node.sh npm run dev --workspace apps/frontend
scripts.dev:frontend: bash scripts/with-node.sh npm run dev --workspace apps/frontend
scripts.dev:backend: bash scripts/with-node.sh npm run dev --workspace apps/backend
scripts.build: bash scripts/with-node.sh npm run build --workspace @fast-rental/shared && node scripts/sync-logos.mjs && bash scripts/with-node.sh npm run build --workspace @fast-rental/backend && bash scripts/with-node.sh npm run build --workspace @fast-rental/frontend
scripts.lint: bash scripts/with-node.sh npm run lint --workspace @fast-rental/shared && bash scripts/with-node.sh npm run lint --workspace @fast-rental/backend && bash scripts/with-node.sh npm run lint --workspace @fast-rental/frontend
